title: Rumor English dub of 20 Announced release date
display_title: Rumor English dub of 20 Announced release date
wikitext:
[]: [Rumor] English dub of 2.0 Announced release date             Quote Post by KaaVI » Wed Oct 13, 2010 9:21 pm I sent an email to Ms Grant who I would now consider a friend since her visit to australia, I happened to ask her some details about the release of 2.0 and here is the response i got. Also the black squares are me personal info including my real name.[/list][/img]

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Oct 13, 2010 9:33 pm I don't recall hearing that she was involved in the dub.

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Wed Oct 13, 2010 10:20 pm Yes but she seems to know what's going on, she possibly got Asuka's role again. Plus Greenfield may be involved with the dubbing.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Oct 13, 2010 11:09 pm KaaVI wrote: Yes but she seems to know what's going on, she possibly got Asuka's role again. Plus Greenfield may be involved with the dubbing.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Oct 13, 2010 11:19 pm Very interesting. Thank you for that. On a side note, who in the world still uses aol...

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Oct 13, 2010 11:25 pm Seeing as how Evangelion 1.01 was released in November 2009 I say calling a Nov 2011 release for 2.22 is a "No Shit Sherlock" scenario. With no second edition of the film (1.01 to 1.11) it's pretty obvious they're just going to repeat what "worked" before. Play it in a scattered theatrical release schedule over the summer months and then release in time for the 2011 holidays. Hell, if 3.0 comes out in Japan Summer 2011 I'll say right now, it will get a U.S. BluRay release in November 2013.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 13, 2010 11:54 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Very interesting. Thank you for that. On a side note, who in the world still uses aol...

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 12:02 am IrkenEvangelion wrote: On a side note, who in the world still uses aol...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 14, 2010 12:29 am FWIW (for people who didn't know): Funimation is apparently forced to use Japan's release format by Kara (theater release then whatever the DVD/BD release(s) is), according to an older ANN report. Anyway, it should be interesting to see if Grant gets the role or not. And November 2011 sounds good for 2.22 in the states.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 12:56 am Darn it, it's going to be a looong wait for that DVD. By that point I might even have a Blu-Ray player hehe. Oh well, I hope I can at least watch it in theaters and that we get some 3.0 news in-between (or the damn movie too) .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 14, 2010 8:29 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyway, it should be interesting to see if Grant gets the role or not.

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:08 am That means it won't be in Australia until 2012...and no Region B BD until then.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Oct 14, 2010 10:48 am I actually liked the english dub of EoE. I´m looking forward to it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 14, 2010 11:02 am I think I'm just going to say "Fuck it", and get the Hong Kong edition, and then get Funimation to send me a copy for review.

[]:             Quote Post by Zekkykins » Thu Oct 14, 2010 3:38 pm Except the Hong Kong edition is fuckin' terribad. Or, to be fair, the subtitles are. The picture quality is, of course, wonderful, but the subtitles are so hard to read at times, not to mention being a bit Engrish-y in specific parts. Assuming we're talking about the current Hong Kong 2.22 that's on the market. If we're not, for some reason, then... Derp.

[]: Re: [Rumor] English dub of 2.0 Announced release date             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 6:27 pm KaaVI wrote: I sent an email to Ms Grant who I would now consider a friend since her visit to australia, I happened to ask her some details about the release of 2.0 and here is the response i got. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [Rumor] English dub of 2.0 Announced release date             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 7:25 pm tomrule123 wrote: A WHOLE YEAR?! (sorry to act like this, but this is definitely a killjoy.) They promised us it would be released in the spring/summer of 2011.

[]: Re: [Rumor] English dub of 2.0 Announced release date             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 14, 2010 7:32 pm tomrule123 wrote: They promised us it would be released in the spring/summer of 2011.

[]: Or maybe both?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Oct 14, 2010 8:06 pm I seem to remember the ANN article stating Funi announced the DVD/Blue-ray release of 2.22 for Spring 2011. Was that ANN misreporting or am I just hallucinating again?

[]: Re: Or maybe both?             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 8:37 pm Killer Bee wrote: I seem to remember the ANN article stating Funi announced the DVD/Blue-ray release of 2.22 for Spring 2011. Was that ANN misreporting or am I just hallucinating again?

Also the black squares are me personal info including my real name.[/list][/img]
